description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a stark contrast between black and white facades, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the main living area facing a wooden deck. The deck includes a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an outdoor dining area shaded by palm trees, creating a luxurious and inviting outdoor space. The property is bordered by a paved driveway leading to a parked car and is landscaped with a mix of palm and deciduous trees. The rear and side elevations have smaller, more private windows, emphasizing privacy and clean lines. The overall aesthetic is sleek, contemporary, and designed for both comfort and visual impact.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a wooden deck featuring a pool and outdoor lounge, surrounded by palm and deciduous trees.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the black facade, pool, wooden deck, palm trees, and driveway with a car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white facade, small windows, and the driveway with the car parked beside the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white back wall, small windows, and the pool area partially obscured by palm trees.
description_view_3: Front view showcasing the black facade, large glass windows, pool, deck furniture, and lush landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no steps, and no porch, integrated into the black facade.
